creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
on 11/05/2012 22:28 Mark Linimon said the following:
> OK, here are the results (hand-edited to remove things known to be
> broken on some other build):
> 
>   http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-8-exp-latest/index_edited.html
> 
> I'm not sure about graphics/raster3d.  Even though it doesn't fail
> anywhere else that I see, it doesn't seem to have anything to do with
> boost.  OTOH I don't have the cycles to analyze further today.  However,
> a quick scan suggests the others are true positives for boost regressions.
> 
> I'd prefer to run another take with more patches, but if you think that
> we're in more danger of drift as other commits come in in the meantime,
> we could go ahead and do the commit and mark these ports as known-broken
> in the meantime.  They do seem to have few dependencies.

I can offer my help with fixing the post-commit damage.

-- 
Andriy Gapon
